What I Do

Services

Everything you need to keep your community active, engaged, and growing — handled.

Community Management
Daily moderation, engagement, and announcements across Telegram, Discord, and X (Twitter). I keep your community active and clean.
Social Media VA
Content scheduling, posting, and platform management across multiple channels — consistent publishing with no missed days.
Customer & Inbox Support
Fast, reliable responses to user inquiries. I reduce repeat questions, resolve issues, and keep your inbox under control.
Partnership Coordination
Outreach, collaboration setup, and cross-community promotions to grow your reach through strategic partnerships.
VA & Admin Support
Scheduling, research, reporting, data entry, and task management using Notion, ClickUp, and Google Workspace.
Reporting & Tracking
Weekly community metrics, growth reports, content calendars, and moderation logs — so you always know what's happening.
Track Record

Real projects. Real results. No supervision needed.

Community Manager
Bulbaswap
Managed 3,000+ weekly messages across Telegram and X. Maintained sub-5-minute average response time with zero escalations. Built a self-managed FAQ system that cut repeat questions by ~25%.
